title: VG design slug registry (v1)
description: Per-project slug ↔ design source path mapping. Emitted by /vg:design-extract Layer 1 inventory + finalized at Layer 4 merge. Consumed by verify-design-ref-required.py (D-02) cross-check + design extractor router (D-01). One entry per design source asset; slug is filesystem-safe canonical name derived from source path.

version.description: Schema version. Bump when breaking change to slug entry shape.

generated_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of last full registry rebuild.

scope.description: Inventory scope when registry was built — 'all' or specific phase id (e.g. '7.14.3').

slugs.description: Slug → entry map. Slug name MUST match filesystem-safe regex ^[a-z0-9-]+$.

source_path.description: Repo-relative or absolute path to original design source file/dir.

format.description: Detected format. -mcp suffix = MCP-based extractor (Phase 15 D-01); -xml/-pb = legacy file parser; png-structural = .structural.png marker present (OCR applied).

structural_json.description: Path to refs/<slug>.structural.json if extractor produced AST/box-list output.

screenshots.description: Paths to screenshots/<slug>.<state>.png pinned per state.

interactions_md.description: Path to refs/<slug>.interactions.md handler map (HTML/Penboard only).

mcp_handler_used.description: True if extractor used MCP tools (D-01 Pencil/Penboard arms). False for legacy file parsers + HTML/PNG.
